content: ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) curiosity mechanisms can be repurposed to dynamically expand an AI agent's effective working memory capacity for reasoning by prioritizing retention of high-surprise, context-critical information instead of equally weighting all incoming tokens. This approach intentionally limits working memory to only high-curiosity signals, avoiding the performance collapse that comes from exceeding fixed hardware capacity limits.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
